home.title: TCG Master Guide
home.subtitle: In-depth Pokemon Trading Card Game deck guides by <author>Grant Manley</author>, former world #1 ranked player. Constantly updated to keep you ahead of the meta.

about.title: About TCG Master Guide
about.subtitle: Expert deck guides from one of the most accomplished players in competitive Pokemon TCG.
about.authorDescription: TCG Master Guide is written by <author>Grant Manley</author>, an elite competitive Pokemon TCG player who has been ranked #1 in the world. Known for his consistent top finishes and deep understanding of the game, Grant is one of the most accomplished players in the competitive scene.
about.missionDescription: TCG Master Guide provides in-depth deck guides for Pokemon Trading Card Game players of all skill levels. Our guides are constantly updated to reflect the latest meta shifts, new card releases, and competitive strategies. Whether you're just starting out or competing at the highest levels, our deck guides give you the insights you need to succeed.
about.offer1: Detailed deck guides with in-depth text strategies and video matchup breakdowns
about.offer2: Regularly updated content reflecting the current meta
about.offer3: Guides for both beginners and competitive players
about.offer4: Matchup analysis and tech card recommendations
about.offer5: Q&A section where you can ask questions and get answers directly from Grant
about.updatesDescription: Grant continuously updates these deck guides as the meta evolves, new sets release, and strategies develop. Here's how to stay on top of changes:
about.updatesFeature1: Every deck guide shows a "Last updated" date near the top of the page so you can see how recently it was refreshed.
about.updatesFeature2: Subscribers can click the View History button at the top of any deck guide to see exactly what changed in each update. This makes it easy to catch up on new tech options, revised matchup advice, or updated decklists without re-reading the entire guide.
about.qaDescription: Subscribers get access to the <qaLink>Q&A</qaLink> page, where you can ask anything about the Pokemon TCG. Whether it's a specific matchup question, a deck building decision, or general strategy advice, Q&A is there to help.
